message:
fix(bulkhead): correct wait time metrics for all queue exit paths

Fix two metrics gaps in the Bulkhead combinator where queue wait time was
not being tracked for timeout and cancellation exits, and the average wait
time denominator could include still-active entries.

avg_queue_wait_ms denominator fix:
- Previous: divided by total_queued (includes entries still actively waiting)
- Fixed: divide by completed_queued (total_queued minus currently active),
  so the average only reflects entries that have actually finished waiting

Timeout path (process_queue):
- Track cumulative wait time for timed-out entries using
  now_millis.saturating_sub(entry.enqueued_at_millis)
- Update total_wait_time_ms and max_queue_wait_ms_atomic atomically in the
  existing timeout batch-update block

Cancellation path (drop/cancel handler):
- Track wait time for cancelled entries that were still in the queue
- Update total_wait_time_ms and max_queue_wait_ms_atomic before decrementing
  pending_queue_count

Without these fixes, Bulkhead metrics under-reported actual queue wait times
when entries exited via timeout or cancellation rather than being granted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
